title: They’re Putting Diamonds Inside Phones
description:
We might be putting diamonds inside our cell phones soon. But not the kind you’re thinking of…

Every time you send a text or take a photo tiny electrical signals are moving around in your phone and about half of that energy is lost to heat. So to keep it from basically melting, engineers put in a material to quickly move that heat away.  

To find out how diamonds fit into that process, subscribe! 

#diamonds #tech #engineering #phone #shorts
